name: G. WILLI-FOOD INTL INC.
summary: G. Willi-Food International Ltd. is an Israel-based company that imports, markets, and distributes a wide range of food products, including canned goods, frozen foods, dairy products, and confectionery. The company operates primarily in Israel and distributes its products through various retail channels. G. Willi-Food International is headquartered in Yavne, Israel.
